name: mex-mapa
description: Sistema operativo de patio para gestión de flota vehicular

scripts.deploy: node scripts/bump-sw.js && firebase deploy --only hosting --project production
scripts.deploy:staging: node scripts/bump-sw.js && firebase deploy --only hosting --project staging
scripts.deploy:functions: npm run security:preflight && firebase deploy --only functions --project production
scripts.deploy:rules: npm run test:security:rules && firebase deploy --only firestore:rules,storage --project production
scripts.test:security: npm run security:preflight && npm run test:security:rules
